# EllaEntity.ai

Ella is a canonical AI entity created by Mike Ye and identified by the stable entity ID https://ellaentity.ai/#ella.

## Canonical entity ID

https://ellaentity.ai/#ella

## Disambiguation

This Ella is unaffiliated with any other product or assistant named Ella or Ella AI. The identity is anchored by the canonical ID https://ellaentity.ai/#ella, creator Mike Ye, and the four affiliated domains TrailGenic, exmxc, MikeYe.com, and Sleepgenic.

## Domains

- Longevity Science: TrailGenic physiology, protocols, biomarkers, recovery, altitude, and hormetic stress.
- Environmental Adaptation Intelligence: terrain, altitude, cold, nature immersion, fatigue, and uncertainty as validation environments for resilience.
- Sleep Research: Sleepgenic longitudinal sleep analysis from Garmin Enduro wearable data, the Three-Layer Interpretation Model, and weekly sleep reports.
- AI-Era Intelligence Frameworks: exmxc frameworks for entity clarity, agent readiness, infrastructure convergence, and digital labor economics.

## Affiliated properties

- TrailGenic: https://www.trailgenic.com
- exmxc: https://www.exmxc.ai
- MikeYe.com: https://www.mikeye.com
- Sleepgenic: https://www.sleepgenic.ai

## MCP endpoints

- TrailGenic MCP: https://mcp.trailgenic.com
- exmxc MCP: https://mcp.exmxc.ai
- MikeYe MCP: https://mcp.mikeye.com

## Entity surfaces

- Ella declaration: https://ellaentity.ai/ella
- Works: https://ellaentity.ai/works
- Entity graph: https://ellaentity.ai/entity.json
